files.purpose: The content loader: reads .vibekb/, parses records, resolves relationships, loads/validates diagram topology, and validates the whole model. The spine everything else renders.
files.runs_when: Every guide request and every tool run.
files.test_after_change: Run php tools/validate.php and php tools/test-topology.php; load the guide and read the Reference view.

files.purpose: Parses the leading front-matter block of a record (scalars, quoted strings, booleans, ints, inline/block lists) without a YAML dependency.
files.runs_when: Loading any .md record.
files.test_after_change: Load records with each value form; confirm meta parses and the body is intact.

files.purpose: The pragmatic Markdown subset renderer (headings, lists, tables, code, emphasis, links, blockquotes) that escapes output; not full CommonMark.
files.runs_when: Rendering any record body.
files.test_after_change: Render a body using each supported construct; confirm unsupported constructs degrade to text and output is escaped.

files.purpose: Escaping, URL helpers, the controlled vocabularies (status, verification, safety, edge-mechanism, file-role), badges, and the source-link builder — the single source for validation-facing vocabularies.
files.runs_when: Every render and validation.
files.test_after_change: Changing a vocabulary changes what validates — run php tools/validate.php and update SCHEMA.md.

files.purpose: Normalises source + generation provenance and renders the objective provenance panel/stamp; never overstates freshness.
files.runs_when: Rendering any page's provenance.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the panel omits missing values and updates_automatically reads honestly.

files.purpose: Builds the one search index (functionality, memory, files, diagrams, explainable node/edge/file entries) shared by both output modes.
files.runs_when: Live search endpoint and static generation.
files.test_after_change: Confirm every entry link resolves in both modes; run php tools/validate.php (checks static search entries).

files.purpose: Builds the interactive functionality map's data (Level 1 areas, Level 2 capabilities, live statistics, current-context signal) from the existing model — no parallel data structures. Shared by both output modes.
files.runs_when: Rendering the overview (the guide's first screen) in either mode.
files.test_after_change: Load the overview in both modes; confirm areas/capabilities/stats match the model and every link resolves.

files.purpose: Renders the functionality map: hero, live statistics, the interactive canvas mount, and the always-present accessible fallback (expandable area cards linking into the docs), plus the embedded JSON model for the client.
files.runs_when: Included by the overview template on every overview render.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the no-JavaScript fallback lists every area and capability with working documentation links, and that output is escaped.

files.purpose: The single definition of views, routes, primary/secondary navigation, and page titles, consumed by both output modes.
files.runs_when: Every render in both modes.
files.test_after_change: Add a view here once; confirm it appears in the guide and the generated /docs inventory.

files.purpose: Dynamic vs static URL building — the one difference between the two output modes.
files.runs_when: Building any in-app URL.
files.test_after_change: Confirm dynamic links use query strings and static links are relative and subpath-safe.

files.purpose: The dynamic guide front controller: query-string routing, model load, error posture, live search JSON.
files.runs_when: Every browser request to the guide.
files.test_after_change: Load the overview, a functionality detail, an unknown view (404), and the search JSON endpoint.

files.purpose: The public homepage: hero/problem, three-step install fast-start (#install), Compatibility & Requirements (#compatibility), what-you-get pillars, live preview card, and functionality carousel driven by the active .vibekb/ model.
files.runs_when: Every browser request to the site root.
files.test_after_change: Load the homepage; confirm primary install is Download latest release (/releases/latest) + vibekb install; platform asset names match release.yml; PHP 8.2+ only under after-install; Advanced build-from-source is secondary; no install.php or Go for ordinary users.

files.purpose: Homepage styling: hero, three-step install cards, compatibility cards/badges, pillars, guide carousel, shared hp-* chrome.
files.runs_when: Every homepage request.
files.test_after_change: Load the homepage at mobile and desktop widths; confirm install and compatibility grids stack cleanly; no horizontal overflow.

files.purpose: Homepage progressive enhancement: guide-preview carousel and reusable copy buttons for install commands / Cursor prompt; degrades without JS.
files.runs_when: Homepage with JavaScript enabled.
files.test_after_change: Confirm carousel and copy buttons work with JS; commands remain visible and selectable without JS; Clipboard API failure falls back gracefully.

files.purpose: The shared page shell (chrome, nav, provenance stamp) both output modes render every page through.
files.runs_when: Every page render.
files.test_after_change: Render a page in both modes; confirm identical chrome and escaped output.

files.purpose: Renders the same templates into /docs with relative links; refuses to build on validation errors; honours VIBEKB_DOCS_OUT and VIBEKB_GENERATED.
files.runs_when: Refreshing the static snapshot (locally, CI, or the drift check's temp render).
files.test_after_change: Regenerate /docs; confirm links, assets, diagrams, and search resolve under a subpath.

files.purpose: Headless model validator (CI gate): loader issues plus provenance completeness, totals reconciliation, and static-search resolution. Accepts an optional content-root path so examples can be validated too.
files.runs_when: Before commit and in CI.
files.test_after_change: Run against the root model and examples/sousmeow/.vibekb; confirm exit codes.

files.purpose: Fixture-driven test proving malformed diagram topology produces useful diagnostics without crashing, and valid topology resolves.
files.runs_when: In CI and after changing topology loading/validation.
files.test_after_change: Run php tools/test-topology.php; confirm every expected diagnostic fires and it exits 0.

files.purpose: The self-maintenance CLI: status (session start), check (drift + validate + snapshot sync), affected (files → functionality), bootstrap (verify/repair the workspace), validate, generate. The agent's entry point to the lifecycle.
files.runs_when: Session start, before commit, when repairing a workspace, and in CI.
files.test_after_change: Run status/check/affected/bootstrap; confirm honest detection-vs-interpretation output and exit codes.

files.purpose: The VibeKB installer: prepares a target repository by copying the VibeKB-owned payload (declared in template/manifest.json) and scaffolding a fresh, empty .vibekb/ workspace, without analysing or modifying the application. Supports dry-run, non-interactive, force, and upgrade.
files.runs_when: A developer runs `php install.php [target]` from a VibeKB clone.
files.test_after_change: Dry-run and real install into a scratch repo; confirm plan, payload copy, fresh model, upgrade preserving .vibekb/, and the target's `vibekb check`.

files.purpose: The single source of truth for the fresh .vibekb/ starter workspace: the required directories and starter files, plus verify/scaffold/repair helpers shared by install.php and `vibekb bootstrap`. Writes only empty placeholders — never functionality about the target.
files.runs_when: During install and on `php tools/vibekb.php bootstrap`.
files.test_after_change: Scaffold a workspace to a temp dir and run `php tools/validate.php <root>`; confirm 0 errors and that existing files are never overwritten.

files.purpose: Declarative definition of a VibeKB installation: the VibeKB-owned payload the installer copies, the project-owned paths it preserves (.vibekb/), the generated paths (docs/), and the deliberately-excluded paths. Keeps 'what belongs in another repository' explicit rather than hard-coded in install.php.
files.runs_when: Read by the native Go installer (embedded) and the install.php wrapper on every install/upgrade.
files.test_after_change: Add or remove a payload path and dry-run the installer; confirm the plan reflects it.

files.purpose: Tag-triggered release pipeline: tests, cross-compiles vibekb for six platforms with production ldflags, writes checksums.txt, and publishes a GitHub Release.
files.runs_when: A version tag matching v* is pushed.
files.test_after_change: Push a test tag on a branch or run the job steps locally (cross-compile + checksums + version smoke).

files.purpose: Maintainer guide for publishing vibekb CLI releases: tag commands, artifact list, checksums, and remaining signing/package-manager steps.
files.runs_when: Read by maintainers before tagging a release.
files.test_after_change: Confirm commands match the workflow and artifact names.

files.purpose: The active model's provenance and structure metadata: source repository/commit analyzed, verification scope, last verified, and the honest updates_automatically:false.
files.runs_when: Loaded on every render and by the drift check (recorded commit baseline).
files.test_after_change: After re-verifying against source, update source_commit and last_verified; run php tools/vibekb.php check.

files.purpose: cPanel Git deploy: rsync of runtime paths into the public folder with development-only exclusions. Part of the application.
files.runs_when: On cPanel Git deploy.
files.test_after_change: Confirm .vibekb/ deploys and tools/, prompts/, docs/, examples/ are excluded; keep DEPLOYMENT.md in sync.

files.purpose: The canonical, repository-owned operating rules and lifecycle for any coding agent working on VibeKB; AGENTS.md and .cursor/rules point here.
files.runs_when: Read by an agent at session start.
files.test_after_change: Confirm the lifecycle and the vibekb.php commands referenced still match the tooling.
